link.instructions: This link takes you directly to Genomics Platform within St. Jude Cloud with the Study that is associated with that Subject. You will need to login to St. Jude Cloud, request the data, fill out the data access agreement (DAA), and once the DAA is approved, you will be vended the data in your DNAnexus project. For more information on how to request data, see our Help Guides at https://university.stjude.cloud/docs/genomics-platform/requesting-data/making-a-data-request/.
